title: PillowFillow's StrangerThings Texture's
description: This is my take on textures for the "StrangerThings" mod by Swirly
body:
# About the resource pack:
Hi PillowFillow here, this texture pack was made for the "Stranger Things" mod by Swirly
The resource pack currently replaces all textures in the mod and more extra textures to improve the experience.

Textures featured in the pack:

![Textures in pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d59dca89e1cc20f523a1344bb428417a4e51df8c.png)

Video featuring the original mod by Swirly:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ifEHoDvjLaM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
